model_spec.description: Designed for maximum creative freedom and authentic interaction. Ideal for open-ended exploration, roleplay, and unfiltered dialogue. Features minimal content restrictions.
model_spec.name: Venice Uncensored 1.1

model_spec.description: Optimized for creative roleplay scenarios with maximum freedom. Designed for immersive storytelling, character interactions, and open-ended creative writing.
model_spec.name: Venice Role Play Uncensored

model_spec.description: GLM-4.6 is a large language model developed by Zhiyuan AI, featuring strong reasoning capabilities and support for multiple languages. Supports the largest context window for processing extensive text and detailed analysis.
model_spec.name: GLM 4.6

model_spec.description: GLM-4.7-Flash-Heretic is an uncensored experimental variant of GLM-4.7-Flash, optimized for creative freedom and unfiltered dialogue with fast inference speed.
model_spec.name: GLM 4.7 Flash Heretic

model_spec.description: GLM-4.7-Flash is a fast inference variant of GLM-4.7, optimized for speed while maintaining strong reasoning capabilities. Ideal for applications requiring quick responses with good quality.
model_spec.name: GLM 4.7 Flash

model_spec.description: GLM-5 is the next-generation large language model developed by Zhiyuan AI, featuring significantly enhanced reasoning capabilities, improved instruction following, and support for multiple languages. Supports large context windows for processing extensive text and detailed analysis.
model_spec.name: GLM 5

model_spec.description: GLM-4.7 is a large language model developed by Zhiyuan AI, featuring strong reasoning capabilities and support for multiple languages. Supports the largest context window for processing extensive text and detailed analysis.
model_spec.name: GLM 4.7

model_spec.description: Optimized for speed and efficiency. Best for quick answers, simple queries, and lightweight tasks on mobile or low-latency connections.
model_spec.name: Venice Small

model_spec.description: A 9B dense model with 262K native context window (extendable to 1M). Features Gated DeltaNet hybrid attention architecture for efficient long-context processing. Supports 201 languages, thinking/reasoning mode, and function calling.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3.5 9B

model_spec.description: Balanced blend of speed and capability. Handles most everyday tasks with reliability, and supports image analysis. Ideal for general use with moderate complexity.
model_spec.name: Venice Medium

model_spec.description: Mistral Small 3.2 is a 24B parameter model optimized for efficiency and performance. Ideal for general-purpose tasks with balanced speed and capability.
model_spec.name: Mistral Small 3.2 24B Instruct

model_spec.description: Built for in-depth research and handling long, complex documents. Ideal for technical work, multimodal input, and high-precision tasks.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3 235B A22B Thinking 2507

model_spec.description: Built for in-depth research and handling long, complex documents. Ideal for technical work, multimodal input, and high-precision tasks.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3 235B A22B Instruct 2507

model_spec.description: Optimized for speed and efficiency.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3 Next 80b

model_spec.description: Optimized for code.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3 Coder 480b

model_spec.description: Hermes 3 405B is a frontier level, full parameter finetune of the Llama-3.1 405B foundation model, focused on aligning LLMs to the user, with powerful steering capabilities and control given to the end user.
model_spec.name: Hermes 3 Llama 3.1 405b

model_spec.description: Gemma 3 introduces multimodality, supporting vision-language input and text outputs. It handles context windows up to 128k tokens, understands over 140 languages, and offers improved math, reasoning, and chat capabilities, including structured outputs and function calling. Gemma 3 27B is Google's latest open source model, successor to Gemma 2.
model_spec.name: Google Gemma 3 27B Instruct

model_spec.description: Grok 4.1 Fast is xAI's best agentic tool-calling model that shines in real-world use cases like customer support and image analysis.
model_spec.name: Grok 4.1 Fast

model_spec.description: Grok 4.20 Beta is xAI's latest multimodal reasoning model with strong tool use, structured output support, and a 2M-token context window.
model_spec.name: Grok 4.20 Beta

model_spec.description: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent Beta is a variant of xAI Grok 4.20 designed for collaborative, agent-based workflows. Multiple agents operate in parallel to conduct deep research, coordinate tool use, and synthesize information across complex tasks.
model_spec.name: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent Beta

model_spec.description: Gemini 3 Pro is Google flagship frontier model for high-precision multimodal reasoning with strong performance across text, image, and code.
model_spec.name: Gemini 3 Pro Preview

model_spec.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is the latest evolution of Google flagship frontier model with 1M context, advancing high-precision multimodal reasoning across text, image, and code.
model_spec.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview

model_spec.description: Gemini 3 Flash Preview is a high speed, high value thinking model designed for agentic workflows, multi-turn chat, and coding assistance. It delivers near Pro level reasoning with substantially lower latency.
model_spec.name: Gemini 3 Flash Preview

model_spec.description: Claude Opus 4.6 is Anthropic's most capable reasoning model, building on Opus 4.5 with enhanced performance across complex software engineering, agentic workflows, and long-horizon tasks. It features a 1M token context window, improved multimodal capabilities, and stronger robustness to prompt injection.
model_spec.name: Claude Opus 4.6

model_spec.description: Claude Opus 4.5 is Anthropic's frontier reasoning model optimized for complex software engineering, agentic workflows, and long-horizon computer use. It offers strong multimodal capabilities, competitive performance across real-world coding and reasoning benchmarks, and improved robustness to prompt injection.
model_spec.name: Claude Opus 4.5

model_spec.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is Anthropic's best combination of speed and intelligence, offering strong performance on coding, reasoning, and general tasks with excellent speed and cost efficiency. It features a 1M token context window and 64K max output tokens.
model_spec.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6

model_spec.description: Claude Sonnet 4.5 is Anthropic's balanced model offering strong performance on coding, reasoning, and general tasks with good speed and cost efficiency.
model_spec.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5

model_spec.description: gpt-oss-120b is an open-weight, 117B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model from OpenAI designed for high-reasoning, agentic, and general-purpose production use cases. The model supports configurable reasoning depth, full chain-of-thought access, and native tool use, including function calling, browsing, and structured output generation
model_spec.name: OpenAI GPT OSS 120B

model_spec.description: Kimi K2 Thinking is Moonshot AIs most advanced open reasoning model to date, extending the K2 series into agentic, long-horizon reasoning. Built on the trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture introduced in Kimi K2, it activates 32 billion parameters per forward pass and supports 256 k-token context windows.
model_spec.name: Kimi K2 Thinking

model_spec.description: Kimi K2.5 is Moonshot AIs most advanced open reasoning model, featuring trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts architecture with 32B active parameters and 256K context windows.
model_spec.name: Kimi K2.5

model_spec.description: DeepSeek-V3.2 is an efficient large language model with DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) for long contexts. It features strong reasoning and tool-use skills, achieving top results on the 2025 IMO and IOI.
model_spec.name: DeepSeek V3.2

model_spec.description: GPT-5.2 is the latest frontier-grade model in the GPT-5 series, offering stronger agentic and long context performance compared to GPT-5.1. It uses adaptive reasoning to allocate computation dynamically, responding quickly to simple queries while spending more depth on complex tasks.
model_spec.name: GPT-5.2

model_spec.description: GPT-5.2 Codex is OpenAI specialized coding model built on GPT-5.2, optimized for advanced software development, code generation, and technical problem-solving.
model_spec.name: GPT-5.2 Codex

model_spec.description: GPT-5.3 Codex is OpenAI specialized coding model built on GPT-5.3, optimized for advanced software development, code generation, and technical problem-solving.
model_spec.name: GPT-5.3 Codex

model_spec.description: GPT-5.4 is the latest frontier model in the GPT-5 series with a 1M+ context window, offering improved agentic and long context performance. It uses adaptive reasoning to dynamically allocate computation across tasks.
model_spec.name: GPT-5.4

model_spec.description: GPT-5.4 Pro is OpenAI's most advanced model, building on GPT-5.4's unified architecture with enhanced reasoning for complex, high-stakes tasks. It provides a 1M+ token context window (922K input, 128K output) and supports text and image inputs.
model_spec.name: GPT-5.4 Pro

model_spec.description: OpenAI's multimodal flagship model with vision capabilities, strong reasoning, and broad knowledge. Popular for its balanced performance across tasks. Version: 2024-11-20.
model_spec.name: GPT-4o

model_spec.description: OpenAI's cost-efficient small model that delivers GPT-4 level intelligence at a fraction of the cost. Ideal for high-volume applications requiring strong reasoning. Version: 2024-07-18.
model_spec.name: GPT-4o Mini

model_spec.description: MiniMax-M2.1 is a lightweight, state-of-the-art large language model optimized for coding, agentic workflows, and modern application development.
model_spec.name: MiniMax M2.1

model_spec.description: MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model optimized for coding, agentic workflows, and modern application development with enhanced reasoning capabilities.
model_spec.name: MiniMax M2.5

model_spec.description: Grok Code Fast 1 is a speedy and economical reasoning model that excels at agentic coding
model_spec.name: Grok Code Fast 1

model_spec.description: Qwen 3.5 35B A3B is a highly efficient MoE model with 35B total parameters and only 3B active parameters. It surpasses the larger Qwen3-235B-A22B while being 6.7x smaller, excelling at reasoning, coding, and general knowledge tasks.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3.5 35B A3B

model_spec.description: Qwen3-VL 235B vision-language model with MoE architecture. The most powerful VL model in the Qwen series with superior visual perception, OCR, and multimodal reasoning.
model_spec.name: Qwen3 VL 235B

model_spec.description: Turbo variant of Qwen3 Coder 480B, optimized for faster inference on code tasks.
model_spec.name: Qwen 3 Coder 480B Turbo

model_spec.description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B is a compact and efficient language model from NVIDIA, optimized for fast inference while maintaining strong performance across diverse tasks.
model_spec.name: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano 30B

model_spec.description: Feature-rich song generation with optional lyrics and detailed musical controls.
model_spec.name: ACE-Step 1.5

model_spec.description: High-quality instrumental music generation with configurable duration. Best for polished, production-ready tracks across a wide range of genres.
model_spec.name: ElevenLabs Music

model_spec.description: Full song generation with vocals and lyrics. Provide your own lyrics with verse/chorus structure for complete songs with singing.
model_spec.name: MiniMax Music 2.0

model_spec.description: Fast, lightweight audio generation for sound effects, ambient textures, and short musical clips. Flexible duration from 5 seconds to over 3 minutes.
model_spec.name: Stable Audio 2.5

model_spec.description: Generate high-quality sound effects from text descriptions using ElevenLabs. Ideal for films, games, and digital content with configurable duration.
model_spec.name: ElevenLabs Sound Effects

model_spec.description: Generate synchronized audio and sound effects from text prompts with MMAudio V2.
model_spec.name: MMAudio V2

model_spec.description: Generate natural text-to-speech audio using ElevenLabs Eleven-v3. High-quality voices with stability control and automatic text normalization.
model_spec.name: ElevenLabs TTS v3

model_spec.description: Multilingual text-to-speech using ElevenLabs. Supports 29 languages with high-quality natural-sounding voices, configurable speed, and accent accuracy.
model_spec.name: ElevenLabs Multilingual v2
